languages.text: "Ох, не для того меня в штрафной легион определили..."

languages.text: "Oh, they didn't stick me in the penal legion to end up here..."

languages.text: "Oh, die haben mich nicht in die Straflegion gesteckt, um hier oben zu verrecken ..."
languages.original_text: "Oh, they didn't stick me in the penal legion to end up here..."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, die haben mich nicht in die Straflegion gesteckt, um hier oben zu verrecken ..."

languages.text: “哦，他们把我塞进判罪军团，可不是要我死在这种地方的……”
languages.original_text: "Oh, they didn't stick me in the penal legion to end up here..."

traits.locale_text: “哦，他们把我塞进判罪军团，可不是要我死在这种地方的……”

languages.text: « Oh, je n'ai pas écopé d'un service pénal pour me retrouver ici... »
languages.original_text: "Oh, they didn't stick me in the penal legion to end up here..."

traits.locale_text: « Oh, je n'ai pas écopé d'un service pénal pour me retrouver ici... »

languages.text: «Ay, no me endosaron a la legión penal para acabar aquí...».
languages.original_text: "Oh, they didn't stick me in the penal legion to end up here..."

traits.locale_text: «Ay, no me endosaron a la legión penal para acabar aquí...».

languages.text: "Ceza infaz lejyonuna buraya düşmem için sokulmuş olamam..."
languages.original_text: "Oh, they didn't stick me in the penal legion to end up here..."

traits.locale_text: "Ceza infaz lejyonuna buraya düşmem için sokulmuş olamam..."

languages.text: 「ああ、俺をペナル・レギオンに投入したのは、結局ここに来るためだったのか…」
languages.original_text: "Oh, they didn't stick me in the penal legion to end up here..."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、俺をペナル・レギオンに投入したのは、結局ここに来るためだったのか…」
